en: Many, numerous. Prove, justify. Agree, concur.
ko: Many, numerous(수많은). Prove, justify(증명하다). Agree, concur(동의하다). Good, advantageous(유리한). Bad, detrimental(해로운). Show,
ja: Many, numerous（多数の）。Prove, justify（正当化する）。Agree, concur（同意する）。
zhTW: Many, numerous（眾多的）。Prove, justify（證明）。Agree, concur（同意）。
vi: Many, numerous (nhieu). Prove, justify (chung minh). Agree, concur (dong y).

ja: Good, advantageous（有利な）。Bad, detrimental（有害な）。Show,
zhTW: Good, advantageous（有利的）。Bad, detrimental（有害的）。Show,
vi: Good, advantageous (co loi). Bad, detrimental (co hai). Show,

en: Elucidate. However, conversely. So, subsequently. Ask, inquire. Be careful, be.
ko: elucidate(설명하다). However, conversely(반대로). So, subsequently(그 후에). Ask, inquire(질문하다). Be careful, be
ja: Elucidate（解明する）。However, conversely（逆に）。So, subsequently（その後）。Ask, inquire（尋ねる）。Be careful, be
zhTW: Elucidate（闡明）。However, conversely（反過來）。So, subsequently（隨後）。Ask, inquire（詢問）。Be careful, be
vi: Elucidate (lam ro). However, conversely (nguoc lai). So, subsequently (sau do). Ask, inquire (hoi). Be careful, be
